nasb.text: Other seed fell among the thorns, and the thorns came up and choked it, and it yielded no crop.

esv.text: Other seed fell among thorns, and the thorns grew up and choked it, and it yielded no grain.

cnv.text: 有的落在荊棘裡，荊棘長起來，把它擠住，它就結不出果實來。

ccb.text: 有些落在荆棘丛中，荆棘长起来便把嫩苗挤住了，以致不能结实；

csbs.text: 另有落进荆棘丛里的，荆棘长起来把它挤住，它就结不出果实了。
